form.formComment: Gelding returning from a spell and has won previously when first up. Finished off last preparation 12th of 16 at Flemington in the G1 Vic Derby November 1 over 2500m, 9 len behind Observer with 57kg at $31. First up last campaign seventh of 9 at Caulfield in the G3 Mcneil August 30 over 1200m, soft track; 7 len behind Tycoon Star with 58kg at $19. Has ability and this trip suits fresh.

formComments.title: TAB

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Began awkwardly, shifted out and made contact with Crack A Deel.

form.formComment: Resumes after a break of three-and-a-half months and has been in the money when fresh before. Finished off last campaign third of 7 at Hobart in the LR Tas Guineas December 28 over 1600m, 5 len behind Mazzini carrying 57kg at $18. Previously first up; ran last of 11 at Flemington 3yo SWP November 4 over 1000m, soft track; 6 len behind Pallaton carrying 57kg at $91. Not the worst.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(2). Resumes after a break of three-and-a-half months and has been in the money when fresh before. Previously first up; ran last of 11 at Flemington 3yo SWP November 4 over 1000m, soft track; 6 len behind Pallaton carrying 57kg at $91. Not the worst.

form.formComment: Third-up today. First-up favourite; tracked the speed and boxed on steadily; won by 0.5 len at Sale 0 - 62 March 1 over 1212m on a soft track defeating Small Town Hero with 60kg at $3.50. Second run from a spell favourite; won by 0.8 len at Pakenham 3yo Bm64 March 26 over 1200m on a rain affected track defeating Toy Queen with 61kg at $3.20. Well placed. Harder now but is going the right way and draws well.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(8). Third-up today. Second run from a spell favourite; won by 0.8 len at Pakenham 3yo Bm64 March 26 over 1200m on a rain affected track defeating Toy Queen with 61kg at $3.20. Well placed. Harder now but is going the right way and draws well.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced keenly in the early stages. Raced three wide without cover throughout.

form.formComment: Recent form sound. At the latest run 4th of 10 at Flemington 3yo Hcp on March 28 over 1400m, on heavy track; 2 len behind Exit with 55.5kg at $4.20. Before that 4th of 7 at Sandown-Hillside Bm78 on March 11 over 1400m, 1.2 len behind Everain carrying 54kg at $7.50. Racing well and should take beating.

form.formComment: Claiming his maiden victory on debut; came from midfield and won by 0.8 len at Bendigo Mdn-Sw March 27 over 1300m defeating Love 'N' Glory with 59kg at $13. Nice type but this is a strong race.

form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up in the past.
